{

    {

            "Create Docker images for services",
            "Set up Kubernetes cluster",
            "Integrate automated testing"
          ]

        {

          "tasks": [
            "Design raw data schema",
            "Implement source connectors",
            "Develop ingestion scripts",
            "Validate data quality"
          ]
        },
        {
          "member": "Junior Backend Engineer",
          "focus_area": "Backend API scaffolding for data access",
          "allocated_days": 8,
          "tasks": [
            "Create REST endpoint skeleton",
            "Implement authentication middleware",
            "Write unit tests",
            "Document API contracts"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "total_capacity_days": 24,
      "planned_velocity": 30
    },
    {
      "sprint_number": 2,
      "sprint_goal": "Implement data transformation, storage, and reporting dashboards",
      "allocations": [
        {
          "member": "DevOps Engineer",
          "focus_area": "Production deployment and monitoring",
          "allocated_days": 8,
          "tasks": [
            "Deploy services to production cluster",
            "Configure Prometheus/Grafana monitoring",
            "Set up alerting rules",
            "Optimize CI/CD pipelines"
          ]
        },
        {
          "member": "Data Engineer",
          "focus_area": "Data transformation and storage",
          "allocated_days": 8,
          "tasks": [
            "Build transformation jobs",
            "Create data warehouse tables",
            "Implement data partitioning",
            "Write data validation tests"
          ]
        },
        {
          "member": "Junior Backend Engineer",
          "focus_area": "Reporting API and dashboard integration",
          "allocated_days": 8,
          "tasks": [
            "Develop reporting endpoints",
            "Integrate with front‑end dashboard",
            "Add pagination and filtering",
            "Write integration tests"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "total_capacity_days": 24,
      "planned_velocity": 32
    }
  ],
  "risks": [
    "Data source latency may affect ingestion schedules",
    "Insufficient test coverage could lead to regressions",
    "Team members unfamiliar with new monitoring tools"
  ],
  "buffer_days": 2
}

A developer has raised this issue: "Implement fan subscription billing with proration, pausing, and dunning management"
Domain: social | Complexity: medium

Break this down into a well-structured task with full project management detail.

Return JSON with this exact structure:
{
  "task_id": "TASK-XXX",
  "title": "short action-verb title",
  "description": "2-3 sentence detailed description",
  "acceptance_criteria": ["criterion 1", "criterion 2", "criterion 3"],
  "story_points": <fibonacci: 1,2,3,5,8,13>,
  "priority": "Critical|High|Medium|Low",
  "labels": ["label1", "label2"],
  "dependencies": ["describe any blocking tasks or leave empty array"],
  "definition_of_done": "clear measurable done state"
}
reference:
{
  "task_id": "TASK-452",
  "title": "Implement fan subscription billing",
  "description": "Develop the backend and API endpoints to support fan subscription billing with prorated charges, the ability to pause subscriptions, and automated dunning management for failed payments. Ensure the system integrates with the existing payment gateway and updates user subscription status in real time.",
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "Prorated billing is calculated correctly for mid-cycle upgrades and downgrades.",
    "Users can pause and resume subscriptions, with the pause period reflected in billing cycles.",
    "Automated dunning workflow triggers retries, sends notifications, and escalates after configurable attempts.",
    "All billing actions are logged and visible in the admin dashboard.",
    "Unit and integration tests cover 95% of the new code paths."
  ],
  "story_points": 8,
  "priority": "High",
  "labels": [
    "billing",
    "subscription",
    "backend"
  ],
  "dependencies": [
    "TASK-401 (Setup payment gateway integration)"
  ],
  "definition_of_done": "Code merged to main, passing CI pipeline, documentation updated, deployed to staging with successful end‑to‑end test flow, and sign‑off from product owner."
}
response:
{
  "task_id": "TASK-CRE-001",
  "title": "Implement Fan Subscription Billing with Proration, Pausing, and Dunning Management",
  "description": "Develop a comprehensive fan subscription billing system that supports proration, pausing, and dunning management to ensure seamless and accurate financial transactions for creators on the platform.",
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "The system accurately calculates prorated charges based on the subscription period and billing cycle.",
    "The system allows creators to pause their subscriptions without losing access to their content.",
    "The system sends timely reminders and notifications to creators when their subscription is about to expire or has been paused."
  ],
  "story_points": [8, 13],
  "priority": "High",
  "labels": ["billing", "subscription", "proration", "dunning"],
  "dependencies": [],
  "definition_of_done": "The feature is live, and all acceptance criteria are met. The system is thoroughly tested, and the code is reviewed by at least two team members. The definition of done includes automated tests, code quality checks, and documentation updates."
}

  "title": "Implement Real-Time Route Optimisation",
  "description": "Develop a real-time route optimisation engine capable of handling a fleet of 500 autonomous vehicles, supporting dynamic rerouting based on traffic, weather, and vehicle status. Integrate the engine with the existing Fleet Management OS and expose APIs for client consumption.",
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "Routing engine processes at least 500 vehicle requests concurrently with a maximum latency of 200 ms per request.",

    "Integration with Telemetry Service"

}
response:
{
  "task_id": "TASK-FMO-001",
  "title": "Implement Real-Time Route Optimisation for 500-Vehicle Fleet",
  "description": "Develop and integrate a real-time route optimisation algorithm that dynamically reroutes vehicles based on traffic updates, vehicle availability, and other factors to minimize delays and reduce fuel consumption.",
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "The system can process 500+ vehicle routes in real-time with minimal latency (< 2 seconds)",
    "The algorithm adapts to changing traffic conditions and vehicle availability within 30 seconds of update",
    "Fuel consumption is reduced by at least 10% compared to current routing methods"
  ],
  "story_points": [1, 2, 3, 5, 8],
  "priority": "Critical",
  "labels": ["autonomous-systems", "high-complexity"],
  "dependencies": ["TASK-FMO-002: Vehicle Data Integration", "TASK-FMO-003: Traffic API Setup"],
  "definition_of_done": "The real-time route optimisation algorithm is fully integrated, tested, and deployed, with measurable improvements in fuel efficiency and reduced travel times."
}

input:
You are a project manager for the Social Feed Service project.

A developer has raised this issue: "Re-architect activity feed from pull to push fanout model to reduce read latency"
Domain: social | Complexity: high

Break this down into a well-structured task with full project management detail.

Return JSON with this exact structure:
{
  "task_id": "TASK-XXX",
  "title": "short action-verb title",
  "description": "2-3 sentence detailed description",
  "acceptance_criteria": ["criterion 1", "criterion 2", "criterion 3"],
  "story_points": <fibonacci: 1,2,3,5,8,13>,
  "priority": "Critical|High|Medium|Low",
  "labels": ["label1", "label2"],
  "dependencies": ["describe any blocking tasks or leave empty array"],
  "definition_of_done": "clear measurable done state"
}
reference:
{
  "task_id": "TASK-101",
  "title": "Re-architect activity feed to push fanout model",
  "description": "Replace the current pull‑based activity feed with a push fanout architecture to deliver new activities to followers in real time. Implement the fanout service, update data pipelines, and ensure backward compatibility with existing API contracts.",
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "New activities are pushed to follower timelines within 200 ms of creation.",
    "Read latency for activity feed requests is reduced by at least 50 % compared to the pull model.",
    "All existing feed API endpoints continue to return correct data during and after migration."
  ],
  "story_points": 13,
  "priority": "Critical",
  "labels": [
    "social",
    "feed",
    "architecture",
    "performance"
  ],
  "dependencies": [],
  "definition_of_done": "Code merged to main branch, unit and integration tests covering 90 % of new logic, performance benchmark reports demonstrating latency targets, updated deployment scripts, and documentation of the new fanout flow."
}
response:
{
  "task_id": "TASK-SFS-001",
  "title": "Migrate Activity Feed to Push Fanout Model",
  "description": "Re-design the activity feed system to utilize a push fanout model instead of the current pull model, reducing read latency and improving overall system responsiveness.",
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "Activity feed data is processed in real-time, with minimal latency",
    "System can handle increased load without significant performance degradation",
    "Fanout model successfully replaces pull model without introducing new errors"
  ],
  "story_points": [8, 13, 20],
  "priority": "High",
  "labels": ["Social Feed Service", "Performance Optimization"],
  "dependencies": ["TASK-SFS-002: Implement Queueing System"],
  "definition_of_done": "The push fanout model is fully implemented, tested, and deployed, with monitoring in place to ensure real-time processing and minimal latency."
}
